incorrect.source_says: JM2019 is a real iPSC line in the paper, but the SIX6-GFP reporter (the extracted assay_endpoint) belongs to IMR90-4, not JM2019. JM2019 carries the BRN3b-EGFP-Thy1.2 reporter. The single chosen line is arbitrary; the protocol uses six lines (H7, H9, IMR90-4, WTC11, PGP1, JM2019).
incorrect.evidence_quote: iPSC lines IMR90-4, WTC11, PGP1, and JM2019 ... including the H7 cell line (BRN3b-tdTomato-Thy1.2), IMR90-4 (SIX6-GFP), and JM2019 (BRN3b-EGFP-Thy1.2)
incorrect.source_loc: methods_text: Maintenance of hPSC Cultures / CRISPR-Cas9 Gene Editing

incorrect.extracted: B27 supplement concentration=null; MEM nonessential amino acids concentration=null; FBS concentration=null
incorrect.source_says: Source gives explicit doses: 2% B27, 1% MEM NEAA, 1% FBS in RDM (plus 500 uL FBS on Day 8). Concentrations were available but not extracted.
incorrect.evidence_quote: Retinal Differentiation Medium [RDM, consisting of DMEM/F12 (3:1), 2% B27 supplement, 1% MEM nonessential amino acids, and 1x anti-anti] with 1% fetal bovine serum (FBS)
incorrect.source_loc: methods_text: Retinal Organoid Differentiation from hPSCs

recall_misses.source_says: Core differentiation medium applied Days 1-6; missing entirely from base_media/media_supplements/timeline.
recall_misses.evidence_quote: all spent media were replaced with 6 mL of fresh mTeSR1/mTeSR PLUS, as well as 6 mL of fresh Neural Induction Medium (NIM)
recall_misses.source_loc: methods_text: Retinal Organoid Differentiation from hPSCs

recall_misses.source_says: RDM base media (DMEM/F12 3:1) is the second-phase base medium from Day 16 onward; not captured in base_media.
recall_misses.evidence_quote: Retinal Differentiation Medium [RDM, consisting of DMEM/F12 (3:1), 2% B27 supplement, 1% MEM nonessential amino acids, and 1x anti-anti]
recall_misses.source_loc: methods_text: Retinal Organoid Differentiation from hPSCs

recall_misses.source_says: 1x anti-anti is a stated RDM component; missing from media_supplements.
recall_misses.evidence_quote: 1% MEM nonessential amino acids, and 1x anti-anti
recall_misses.source_loc: methods_text: Retinal Organoid Differentiation from hPSCs

recall_misses.source_says: Optimized starting cell density per aggregate, central to the standardized protocol; not captured.
recall_misses.evidence_quote: we decided to use a seeding density of 2,000 cells/aggregate for further experiments, as this density appeared to provide the greatest reproducibility

recall_misses.item: Low-adhesion 96-well U-bottom plates + forced reaggregation by centrifugation
recall_misses.source_says: Defining substrate/method of the standardized aggregation step; missing from passaging/timeline.
recall_misses.evidence_quote: singularized cells were seeded into low-adhesion 96-well U-bottom plates at defined cell numbers followed by centrifugation resulting in a forced reaggregation

recall_misses.source_says: Extracted timeline is empty despite a fully specified day-by-day schedule including BMP4/LDN on Day 6, FBS on Day 8, transfer to RDM on Day 16, and analysis to Day 150.
recall_misses.evidence_quote: On Day 6, 12 mL of fresh NIM with either 50 ng/mL of BMP4 or 200 nM of LDN-193189 ... On Day 8 ... 500 uL of Fetal Bovine Serum (FBS) ... On Day 16, organoids were manually removed from the plates and transferred to 10 cm dishes containing Retinal Differentiation Medium
recall_misses.source_loc: methods_text: Retinal Organoid Differentiation from hPSCs; Fig. 2A & Fig. 6 (Day 30/60/150)

recall_misses.source_says: A distinct FBS application (adhesion) separate from the 1% FBS in RDM; dose/timepoint not captured.
recall_misses.evidence_quote: On Day 8 of differentiation, 500 uL of Fetal Bovine Serum (FBS) was then added directly to each well of a six-well plate to ensure cellular aggregates adhere to wells
recall_misses.source_loc: methods_text: Retinal Organoid Differentiation from hPSCs

recall_misses.item: Alternative matrix Geltrex and alternative passaging ReLeSR; alternative base mTeSR PLUS
recall_misses.source_says: Source lists permissible alternatives (Geltrex for Matrigel, ReLeSR for Accutase, mTeSR PLUS for mTeSR1); only one of each pair extracted.
recall_misses.evidence_quote: maintained on six well-plates coated with either Matrigel or Geltrex and grown in mTeSR1 or mTeSR PLUS medium ... passaged using either Accutase or ReLeSR

notes: Every extracted value present is correct and well-grounded (BMP4 50 ng/mL, LDN-193189 200 nM verbatim; Matrigel, mTeSR1, Accutase, retinal type all correct). The two BMP signaling factors and their doses are accurate. Main weaknesses are RECALL: the entire timeline array is empty despite a fully day-resolved schedule (Days 1-16, out to Day 150), and the protocol-defining NIM medium, RDM base (DMEM/F12 3:1), 1x anti-anti, the 96-well U-bottom forced-reaggregation step, and the optimized 2,000 cells/well seeding density were all missed. Supplement concentrations (2% B27, 1% MEM NEAA, 1% FBS) were stated in source but extracted as null. Figures 1 and 2 were visually read: schematics confirm single-cell Accutase dissociation, 96-well U-bottom seeding, 250-8000 cpw densities, and Day -1/Day 1/Day 16 timeline; no additional reagent doses appear in figure schematics. JM2019 line choice is defensible but mismatched to the SIX6:GFP endpoint (IMR90-4 reporter).
